title: Episode 21 Third Impact papers
wikitext:
[]: Episode 21 Third Impact papers             Quote Post by AWinters » Fri Jun 11, 2021 10:33 pm Quite probable that this has already been sighted, but I couldn't find a thread about it. Has anyone paused episode 21 and read the secret papers regarding the 3rd Impact that Fuyutsuki had acquired? They're in English and the text is about Anno's work. Some words are hard to make out, but it looks interesting.

[]: Re: Episode 21 Third Impact papers             Quote Post by Berserker » Sat Jun 12, 2021 5:41 am It's pretty much intelligible on my end. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Episode 21 Third Impact papers             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Jun 12, 2021 11:02 am Oh that is hilarious. This is up there with putting graphic software install guides as the boot screen in.... I'm blanking on which Gundam show it was. I love this.

[]: Re: Episode 21 Third Impact papers             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sat Jun 12, 2021 11:14 am Yeah, that's sweet! It reminded me of the classic laptop frame in The End of Evangelion. I remember pausing the movie while expecting to uncover some interesting information about the First Impact, or something like that. Instead, I found something much better hahaha! It was the history of GAINAX, but framed as a top secret document. If I'm not mistaken, it was talking about the company's origens as if it was the First Impact, or something like that (which, if you think about it, makes sense in a way hahaha).

[]: Re: Episode 21 Third Impact papers             Quote Post by cyharding » Sat Jun 12, 2021 1:28 pm Blockio wrote: Oh that is hilarious. This is up there with putting graphic software install guides as the boot screen in.... I'm blanking on which Gundam show it was. I love this.

[]: Re: Episode 21 Third Impact papers             Quote Post by AWinters » Sat Jun 12, 2021 9:14 pm If anyone has a blu-ray of Neon Genesis, you'll probably be able to acquire a clearer picture. I can only make out that it's got quite a bit about Gainax and Daicon 1-4. I may also look up the festivals mentioned.
